title: Re-Cursor Template
body:
# Re-Cursor Template
This is a template resource-pack for the **Re-Cursor Mod** (download [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/re-cursor)). Feel free to edit the pack however you want.

Note:
When you change or apply the texture pack it will not update the textures. To see the changes make sure to **RESTART** the game!

Tips:
The Default Re-Cursor texture is 64x64 pixels this makes a good mid-sized cursor. If you want something smaller 32x32 pixels works well. Although all resolutions are supported, <64x gets compressed on MAC devices (this is a quirk of how MAC and retina displays handle cursors)
